tickets.subject: Degree collection
tickets.description:
To,
The Controller of Examinations,
Islamia University of Bahawalpur

Subject: Application for Degree Issuance

Respected Sir/Madam,
I am Haris, student of computer science, Semester [4], Roll No F24BDOCS1M01259. I request you to please issue my degree certificate.

Thank you
